name: How do I stop Siri from suggesting the wrong things?
description: Adjust Siri Suggestions, language, region, and app permissions. Turning off learning for unused apps can help too.

mainEntity.name: How do I stop Siri from suggesting the wrong things?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check whether Siri Suggestions, language, region, and app permissions are aligned with how you actually use the device. If Siri keeps surfacing irrelevant prompts, those settings are often the reason. You may also need to disable suggestions for apps you do not want Siri learning from.
acceptedAnswer.description: Adjust Siri Suggestions, language, region, and app permissions. Turning off learning for unused apps can help too.
